LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: High score entry for the Infinite Obby mini-game

username.description: The custom gamer tag entered by the user

score.description: The high score representing SkyStars collected

timestamp.description: When the high score was achieved

totalClicks.description: Total click interactions in the squad panel

totalWins.description: Total collective wins or obby checkpoints reached

VideoSuggestion.title: VideoSuggestion
VideoSuggestion.description: User-submitted video concepts for Skyzon's channel

title.description: The title of the suggested video topic

username.description: The user who suggested the topic

votes.description: Number of upvotes for this suggestion

leaderboard/{documentId}.description: Global scoreboard of the top chillers in the Infinite Obby

stats/{documentId}.description: Single-document or multi-document counter for community metrics

suggestions/{documentId}.description: Video suggestion board where fans upvote ideas
